repo.description: Muggled DPT: Depth estimation without the magic

terms.context_snippet: This repo contains a simplified implementation of the very cool 'dense prediction transformer' (DPT) depth estimation model from [isl-org/MiDaS](https://github.com/isl-org/MiDaS), with the intention of [removing the magic](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Muggle) from the original …
